name: Wires and Fabriks (S.A.) Limited
summary: Wires and Fabriks (S.A.) Limited is an Indian manufacturer of paper machine clothing, which are engineered fabrics used in the paper manufacturing process. The company produces forming fabrics, press felts, and dryer fabrics that are used in paper mills to improve paper quality and production efficiency. Wires and Fabriks (S.A.) Limited is headquartered in Kolkata, India.
